LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT R.C. CHRONICLE BUILDING'S MOTION TO COMPEL JUDICIAL REFERENCE AND STAY ACTION IS GRANTED. EACH PARTY SHALL NOMINATE THREE REFEREES AND EXCHANGE ITS LIST BY SEPTEMBER 21, 2012. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING THE SELECTION OF A REFEREE. IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON A REFEREE, THEN EITHER PARTY MAY MAKE AN EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF THE REFEREE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Judicial Regerence And Stay Action; Memo Of P & A And Pos
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anton L. Hasenkampf, Esq. of Allen Matkins, Tel. 415.273.7464, for Defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT R.C. CHRONICLE BUILDING's Motion To Compel Judicial Reference And Stay Action is Granted. Each party shall nominate three referees and exchange its list by September 21, 2012. The parties are ordered to meet and confer regarding the selection of a referee. If the parties cannot agree on a referee, then either party may make an ex parte application for appointment of the referee. Order signed in open Court. Judge: James J. McBride; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
